description: Security & Privacy Package (packages/security) - Complete production security infrastructure with 16 modules: rate limiting (sliding window), DDoS protection (IP reputation, challenge system), CSRF tokens, XSS sanitization, SQL injection prevention, input validation framework, encryption (AES-256-GCM, RSA, key management), password hashing (Argon2id), API key management, OAuth2 security (PKCE, state validation), audit logging, privacy compliance (GDPR), IP geolocation/blocking, honeypot detection, session fixation prevention, CSP generation.
steps: Create packages/security/src/types.ts with all interfaces: RateLimitConfig, SlidingWindowEntry, DDoSConfig, IPReputation, ChallengeResult, CSRFToken, XSSConfig, SanitizeResult, SQLInjectionConfig, ParameterizedQuery, ValidationSchema, ValidationRule, ValidationResult, EncryptionConfig, KeyPair, EncryptedData, PasswordHashResult, APIKey, APIKeyScope, OAuth2Config, PKCEChallenge, AuditLogEntry, GDPRRequest, GDPRExportData, ConsentRecord, GeoLocation, HoneypotConfig, SessionConfig, CSPDirective, CSPPolicy (200+ lines of types)

Create packages/security/src/core/rate-limiter.ts - SlidingWindowRateLimiter class with window-based tracking, token bucket algorithm, per-user/per-IP/per-endpoint limits, burst handling, Redis-like storage simulation (300+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/ddos-protection.ts - DDoSProtector class with IP reputation scoring, challenge-response system (proof-of-work), traffic pattern detection, automatic blocking, allowlists/blocklists, geographic filtering (300+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/csrf-protection.ts - CSRFManager class with double-submit cookie pattern, token generation (HMAC-SHA256 simulation), token validation, per-session tokens, SameSite enforcement (250+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/xss-sanitizer.ts - XSSSanitizer class with HTML entity encoding, URL sanitization, script injection detection, attribute filtering, CSS expression blocking, DOM purifier logic (300+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/sql-injection-guard.ts - SQLInjectionGuard class with parameterized query builder, input pattern detection, escape utilities, prepared statement simulation, query whitelist (250+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/input-validator.ts - InputValidator class with schema-based validation, type checking, range validation, pattern matching, custom validators, nested object validation, array validation (300+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/encryption.ts - EncryptionService class with AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt, RSA keypair generation simulation, key derivation (PBKDF2), envelope encryption, key rotation, secure random generation (350+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/password-hasher.ts - PasswordHasher class with Argon2id simulation (memory-hard hashing), salt generation, timing-safe comparison, password strength scoring, breach detection simulation (250+ lines)
Create packages/security/src/core/api-key-manager.ts - APIKeyManager class with key generation, scoping, rotation, revocation, usage tracking, rate limiting per key, expiry management (250+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/oauth2-security.ts - OAuth2Security class with PKCE (code_challenge/code_verifier S256), state parameter validation, token binding, nonce generation, redirect URI validation, scope validation (300+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/audit-logger.ts - AuditLogger class with structured logging, who/what/when/where tracking, tamper detection, log rotation, searchable index, retention policies (250+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/privacy-compliance.ts - PrivacyCompliance class with GDPR data export, right to deletion, consent management, data minimization, purpose limitation, retention schedules (300+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/ip-geolocation.ts - IPGeolocation class with IP-to-location mapping simulation, country blocking, region detection, VPN/proxy detection, Tor exit node detection (250+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/honeypot.ts - HoneypotDetector class with hidden field detection, timing analysis, bot behavior scoring, trap endpoints, JavaScript challenge verification (200+ lines)

Create packages/security/src/core/session-security.ts - SessionSecurity class with fixation prevention, rotation on privilege escalation, secure cookie attributes, concurrent session limits, idle timeout (250+ lines)
Create packages/security/src/core/csp-generator.ts - CSPGenerator class with directive building, nonce generation, hash computation, report-only mode, policy merging, preset policies (200+ lines)
Create packages/security/src/index.ts barrel export with all 16 modules and all types
acceptance_criteria: packages/security/src/ contains 18 TypeScript files (types + 16 core modules + index)
Each core module is 200-350 lines with real algorithm implementations
All modules export classes with proper TypeScript generics and types
Rate limiter implements actual sliding window algorithm with time-based token cleanup
Encryption implements actual AES-256-GCM logic flow with IV/nonce handling
Input validator supports nested schema validation with custom rules
Running node scripts/test.js passes with new package detected
verification: find packages/security -name '*.ts' | wc -l should show 18 files
wc -l packages/security/src/core/*.ts should show 4000+ total lines
